_comment: Schema for image versions 2026.2+ (AiTaskTypesConfiguration + models with Id). NO Key Vault: with UseAzureKeyVault=false the ApiKey below is the LITERAL OpenAI key, not a secret name. deploy.ps1 injects your -OpenAiApiKey into the ApiKey placeholder and writes the result to .work/aiconfiguration.json (git-ignored) - never commit a real key here.

OpenAi.Description: OpenAI (api.openai.com). ApiKey is the real key because Key Vault is disabled in this sandbox.

ProviderModels.Name: OpenAI (sandbox)
ProviderModels.Description: Sandbox model for the Docker Desktop getting-started. ModelName values are OpenAI model ids.
